title: Roomba normalizes home robots
impact: Made autonomous robots feel normal inside everyday homes.

title: Atlas becomes a mobility benchmark
impact: Showed that dynamic humanoid locomotion could become a serious research and engineering frontier.

title: Spot points toward useful mobile robots
impact: Moved legged robots from spectacle toward inspection, enterprise use, and mapped industrial environments.

title: Tesla frames Optimus as factory-first AI
impact: Connected humanoid robotics with manufacturing scale, autonomy data, and AI infrastructure.

title: Figure AI accelerates workplace humanoids
impact: Helped shift humanoid attention toward near-term labor, enterprise pilots, and manipulation.

title: Unitree G1 pressures the price curve
impact: Visible pricing made humanoid robots easier to benchmark for labs, developers, and early physical AI builders.

title: Physical AI becomes an investment thesis
impact: Robotics, AI infrastructure, simulation, data engines, and embodied intelligence started converging into one market story.

title: Familiar points toward emotionally responsive home robots
impact: Shows a shift from utility-only machines toward robots designed around presence, behavior, and emotional response.
